title: Kilner 26 Piece Chalk Labelling Set
features: CHALK LABELLING SET | The Kilner Chalk Labels are easy peel, self-adhesive and reusable, simply wipe with a damp cloth to clear and re-write. Great for labelling a variety of Kilner Jars of all shapes and sizes. Perfect for organising cupboards and pantries. Smart matt finish set which includes 24 adhesive labels and 2 white sticks of chalk.
TAKING CARE | This product must be wiped with a damp cloth.
PRESERVING ACCESSORIES | Ensure your preserves are perfect every time with our range of essential preserving accessories.
THE KILNER STORY | The original Kilner Jar, invented by John Kilner and Co. in England is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago.
description: From the manufacturer About Us From traditional Kilner Clip Top Jars and Preserve Jars to Drinks Dispensers, Butter Churners, Fermentation Sets and more; the Kilner range offers quality essentials for a variety of different businesses and consumers. The original Kilner Jar, first invented by John Kilner . in 1842. It is owed to its unique pressure seal, iconic design and overall quality. A surge in popularity for preserving home-grown fruit and vegetables, and storing food in glass rather than plastic , has catapulted the Kilner brand into the limelight amongst consumers in recent times. Not only is Kilner an essential for the kitchen, but it has also become a style statement around the home and beyond.
